trans-unit.source: Retries emails that were spooled to the var/typo3-mail-spool/ directory because Microsoft Graph rejected them. Successful deliveries delete the .eml/.json pair; failures stay in the spool with their retry_count incremented. Recommended cadence: every 5 minutes.
Maximum number of spooled emails the task will attempt per run. Default 50.
Spooled emails older than this many days are deleted (abandoned) instead of being retried. Set to 0 to keep entries forever.
